---

## Checklist

Before submitting, confirm the following:

- [ ] My contribution directory is correctly named (lowercase, hyphen-separated)
- [ ] All required base schema fields are present and complete
- [ ] All required type-specific fields (skill or agent) are present and complete
- [ ] I have NOT included platform fields (`domain`, `subdomain`, `verified`, `upvotes`, `usage_count`)
- [ ] `description` is a single sentence under 280 characters
- [ ] `tags` contains between 2 and 10 entries
- [ ] `dependencies` is present with all sub-fields, even if empty
- [ ] `tested_with` contains at least one model I have personally validated
- [ ] The README body includes at minimum an **Overview** and **Usage** section
- [ ] For agents: `system-prompt.md` exists in the contribution directory
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Contributor License Agreement](../CONTRIBUTING.md#contributor-license-agreement)
